title: Teaching Assistant Duty
description: Assisted faculty as a Teaching Assistant under the GATE fellowship during M.Tech at NITK. Conducted tutorials, evaluated assignments, guided students in labs and projects, and supported academic and research activities.

title: Web Developer
description: Built a responsive frontend using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Boosted user engagement by 25% and reduced bounce rate by 18%. Developed a real-time backend with Firebase & Firestore for 1,000+ users. Improved sync performance by 40% through backend optimization. Led UI revamp and collaborated cross-functionally using Git.

title: Freelance Web Developer
description: Designed and developed custom, responsive websites and web applications for various clients. Translated client requirements into functional digital products with a focus on intuitive UI/UX, fast page loads, and modern aesthetics leveraging React and Tailwind CSS.

title: Web Developer
description: Contributed to early-stage development and feature implementations for the core product, assisting with frontend design utilizing modern web technologies.

title: Frontend Web Developer
description: Assisted in building responsive frontend user interfaces for financial technology applications to improve accessibility and user experience.

title: Intern
description: Participated in learning and development tasks focused on software engineering fundamentals and web development practices.
